channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Jenson Brooksby returns to pro tennis at the Australian Open after 2 eventful years away
item.description: American tennis player Jenson Brooksby has made his return to professional tennis after an eventful two years away.
item.dc:creator: Howard Fendrich, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Lakers lose to Spurs 126-102 in their 1st game back after wildfire postponements
item.description: Victor Wembanyama had 23 points and eight rebounds, Harrison Barnes scored 10 of his 17 points in the fourth quarter, and the San Antonio Spurs beat the Lakers 126-102 in Los Angeles’ first game back from two postponements due to the wildfires devastating the area.
item.dc:creator: Greg Beacham, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Connor Ingram returns for Utah Hockey Club
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club began a seven-game homestand last week by winning just one of three games. But they still have four games left at the Delta Center beginning Tuesday night against Montreal.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Young Broncos should be proud of 10-win season
item.description: No one will ever be thrilled about losing a playoff game by 24 points, and the Broncos certainly aren't, but it's incredible how greatly Denver exceeded expectations this season.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Lakers retire Michael Cooper's No. 21 on an emotional night for the Hall of Fame guard from Pasadena
item.description: Michael Cooper spent his entire career with the Los Angeles Lakers as a defense-minded guard who always focused on helping his Showtime teammates to be stars.
item.dc:creator: Greg Beacham, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Sam Darnold's career-best season ends with a thud as he takes 9 sacks in playoff loss
item.description: Sam Darnold’s renaissance pushed Minnesota to one of the NFL’s best records, offering the hope of a deep playoff run.
item.dc:creator: John Marshall, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Taylor Fritz eases into the second round at the Australian Open
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Taylor Fritz showed just how dramatically life has changed for both he and Jenson Brooskby since their last Grand Slam meeting when Fritz took less than two hours to clinch their first-round match at the Australian Open. Fritz is seeded fourth, was the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Rams overcome chaotic week to rout Vikings in playoff game
item.description: The Los Angeles Rams had a lot on their mind as they prepared for the Minnesota Vikings. But the defense held strong in the team's wild-card win.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Packers' Keisean Nixon disputes early fumble in wild-card round game, argues Eagles should have been penalized
item.description: After making 65 kick return attempts over the past two seasons combined, the Packers defensive back and return specialist had made just 18 returns during the 2024 season.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Rams host wild-card playoff game nearly 400 miles east of LA because of wildfires
item.description: GLENDALE, Ariz. (AP) — The Los Angeles Rams made themselves at home on Monday night for their NFL wild-card playoff game against the Minnesota Vikings — even if their adopted stadium featured an unusual amount of red and was nearly 400 miles east of their regular venue.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Roki Sasaki won't sign with New York Yankees, Texas Rangers or San Francisco Giants
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The New York Yankees, Texas Rangers and San Francisco Giants have been informed Japanese pitcher Roki Sasaki won't be signing with them.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Australian Open: Novak Djokovic and new coach Andy Murray get a win against US teen in debut
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Novak Djokovic's first match with former rival Andy Murray as his coach did not start all that well, even against a 19-year-old making his Grand Slam debut.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Viral ring girl Sydney Thomas reveals SEC football coach slid into her DMs amid rising fame
item.description: Viral ring girl Sydney Thomas revealed the "craziest" direct message she received in a recent podcast interview. Her popularity has skyrocketed since November.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lamar Jackson and Josh Allen will face off for a berth in the AFC championship game
item.description: Lamar Jackson vs. Josh Allen won’t decide the NFL MVP next week. The stakes are higher with a spot in the AFC championship game on the line.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Sabonis stars as DeRozan and the streaking Kings beat the Bulls 124-119
item.description: Domantas Sabonis had 22 points, 15 rebounds and eight assists, and the Sacramento Kings beat the Chicago Bulls 124-119 on Sunday to extend their season-high win streak to seven games.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: New England hires former Patriots Super Bowl champ Mike Vrabel as coach
item.description: The New England Patriots have hired Mike Vrabel as their head coach. The team announced the hiring Sunday morning, a week after Patriots owner Robert Kraft fired Jerod Mayo following the team’s season-ending victory over the Buffalo Bills. Mayo finished 4-13 in his lone season.
item.dc:creator: KYLE HIGHTOWER, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: New England Patriots hire former Super Bowl champ Mike Vrabel as next coach; Bears had interviewed him
item.description: Vrabel, a fan favorite during eight seasons as a player in New England where he was a member of its first three Super Bowl winners and an inductee into the team’s Hall of Fame in 2023, was the preferred candidate because of his long association with the franchise and coaching success.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Santa Anita postpones weekend racing as track is staging area for fire relief efforts
item.description: A flareup of the wildfire on the west side of Los Angeles that prompted new evacuations has caused Santa Anita to cancel horse racing this weekend.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Ohio State getting shot at 6th national title after 28-14 win over Texas in CFP semi Cotton Bowl
item.description: Sawyer stripped Texas quarterback Quinn Ewers — his former roommate — and returned the fumble 83 yards for the clinching touchdown in a 28-14 victory over the Longhorns in the Cotton Bowl on Friday night, giving the Buckeyes a shot at their sixth AP national title.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Red Wings hold off Blackhawks 5-3 for 6th straight victory
item.description: Alex DeBrincat and Lucas Raymond each had a goal and an assist and the Detroit Red Wings won their sixth straight game, beating the Chicago Blackhawks 5-3 on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: White Sox sign former Seattle Mariners infielder
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago White Sox signed free agent infielder Josh Rojas Wednesday, according to a press release from the team. The White Sox agreed to terms on a one-year, $3.5-million contract with Rojas. Rojas spent the 2024 season with the Seattle Mariners, hitting .225/.304/.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Boys Basketball: Canyon Hills 47, Crawford 39
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Boys basketball on Tuesday night at Crawford with the Colts hosting Canyon Hills. Rattlers win a very competitive defensive battle 47-39.
item.dc:creator: Fox 5

item.title: Chainsmokers, Zedd to perform in San Francisco for NBA All-Star Weekend
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The NBA's All-Star Weekend is coming to the Bay Area in February, and along with the on-court events, the weekend will feature various festivities throughout the region.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Giants agree to deal with Justin Verlander: reports
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The San Francisco Giants are adding former MVP Justin Verlander to their pitching staff, multiple outlets reported Tuesday. The team reportedly agreed to a one-year deal with the pitcher. Verlander, 41, is one of the best pitchers of the 2000s and a future Hall of Famer.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Kessler celebrating girlfriend's Miss America title
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Walker Kessler has played basketball in front of thousands of fans for the Utah Jazz. But he couldn't have been more stressed Sunday night when his girlfriend, Miss Alabama Abbie Stockard, was a finalist for Miss America.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Raiders fire coach Antonio Pierce after he goes 4-13 in lone full season
item.description: HENDERSON, Nev. (AP) — Antonio Pierce stood behind a lectern and took questions during an end-of-season news conference, even though his future as the Las Vegas Raiders' coach remained very much in question.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Athletics agree to $60M, 5-year contract with slugger Brent Rooker, AP source says
item.description: (AP) -- The Athletics have agreed to a $60 million, five-year contract with slugger Brent Rooker, a person familiar with the negotiations told The Associated Press on Monday night. The person spoke on condition of anonymity because the agreement had not been announced.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4
